scheme_name: HDFC Ultra Short Term Fund Direct Growth
benchmark: CRISIL Ultra Short Duration Debt A-I Index
about_fund:
About HDFC Ultra Short Term Fund Direct Growth HDFC Ultra Short Term Fund Direct Growth is a Debt Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Anil Bamboli is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Ultra Short Term Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,37,048 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 04 Jun 2026 is ₹16.34.
The HDFC Ultra Short Term Fund Direct Growth is rated Low to Moderate risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100.
